headline: Phillips 66 Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) reported first-quarter 2026 earnings as management emphasized operational execution and commercial flexibility amid what it called unprecedented commodity price volatility tied to geopolitical events in the Middle East.
